title: AI Compute Pull-Through — Refreshing the Basket
shortSummary: Reiterating constructive view across the AI compute basket post strong Q1 earnings season. Capex digestion risk remains but order books extend visibility.

title: Quartzite Semiconductors — Initiating at Buy
shortSummary: Initiating coverage of QRTX with a Buy. QX-9 cycle adds incremental TAM; gross margin trajectory under-appreciated.

title: Telara Networks — Upgrade to Buy
shortSummary: Upgrading TLRA on improving competitive position in cloud interconnect and a more favorable mix shift. Bonds (TLRA32) look attractive.

title: Regional Banks — Downgrade Meridian Pacific to Sell
shortSummary: Downgrading MPBN27 on deposit outflow trajectory and CRE concentration. Watch-negative rating action adds technical pressure.

title: Eldoria Bank — Reiterate Neutral
targetOrSpreadView: Neutral; fair value 50bps tight to current

title: Duration Strategy — Trim Long-End Exposure
shortSummary: Sticky core inflation and heavy refunding argue for trimming long-end duration; favor 5s30s steepeners.

title: US Treasury Refunding Preview
shortSummary: Expect 30y refunding to surprise to the upside. Maintain underweight long end.

shortSummary: Strategic review and M&A press add optionality to NAES28 credit. Upgrade to Buy.

shortSummary: Initiating BRGT at Buy. Bolt-on M&A optionality and operating leverage to Permian volumes.

shortSummary: Upgrading KARMA32 on IMF staff-level agreement and improving fiscal optics.

title: Borborema Sovereign — Initiate Neutral
shortSummary: Initiating BORBOR30 at Neutral. Political calendar argues for caution.

shortSummary: Solterra green bond looks attractively priced post-tap. ESG mandate demand should provide spread support.

shortSummary: Positive Phase 3 readout de-risks the lead asset. Upgrading HXLT to Buy.

title: Defense — Keppra Wins Big Contract
shortSummary: Keppra's $7.8B win extends backlog visibility through 2030; reiterate Buy.

shortSummary: Downgrading VLDR on volume risk and operating deleverage. EU auto exposure is the principal concern.

title: Auto OEMs — Veridate Auto Caution Flag
shortSummary: Veridate's profit warning is unlikely to be isolated; cautious on the EU OEM complex broadly.

shortSummary: Cascadia State GO bonds are dislocated from comparables. Adding to munis basket.

shortSummary: Covemark Q1 in line; volume/price dynamics stable. Reiterate Neutral.

title: IG Issuance Watch — May Update
shortSummary: Heavy IG issuance absorbed well. Maintain a tactical long IG bias via INVG.
